revision.content:
This raspberry pi case is an instance of [http://www.thingiverse.com/thing:29456 this thingiverse project]. We set the laser to:
* power: 90
* speed: 10
* current: 80
* passes: 1
And it worked great with just the 1 pass! Everything came out beautifully. I wrote about the experience on my blog [http://austintoombs.com/laser-cut-raspberry-pi-case/ here].
